description: Monitors cert-manager certificate lifecycle, renewal behaviour and controller health using Prometheus metrics scraped from the cert-manager, cainjector and webhook pods.
title: Cert-Manager

4cb01f40-258c-4591-a9c9-0f05e1d0e522.description: Kubernetes namespace where cert-manager is deployed
4cb01f40-258c-4591-a9c9-0f05e1d0e522.name: namespace
4cb01f40-258c-4591-a9c9-0f05e1d0e522.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'namespace'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%certmanager%'

f956a332-f1f4-4811-8e20-fa224dacbe91.name: issuer
f956a332-f1f4-4811-8e20-fa224dacbe91.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'issuer_name'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name = 'certmanager_certificate_expiration_timestamp_seconds'

widgets.description: Total number of certificates managed by cert-manager.
widgets.title: Total Certificates

widgets.description: Certificates expiring within the next 7 days.
widgets.title: Expiring in 7 days

widgets.description: Certificates whose expiration timestamp is in the past.
widgets.title: Expired

widgets.description: Remaining time until each certificate expires.
widgets.title: Days Until Expiration

widgets.description: Remaining time until expiration grouped by issuer.
widgets.title: Days Until Expiration by Issuer

widgets.description: Count of certificates in each Ready condition.
widgets.title: Ready Certificates Over Time

widgets.description: Time in hours until each certificate is scheduled for renewal.
widgets.title: Time Until Next Renewal

widgets.description: Ratio of successful ACME client requests over total, as a proxy for renewal health.
widgets.title: Renewal Success Rate

widgets.description: Success percentage of ACME client requests over the last 5 minutes.
widgets.title: Renewal Success % (5m)

widgets.description: Rate of sync() calls per controller.
widgets.title: Controller Sync Rate

widgets.description: ACME client request rate grouped by HTTP status code.
widgets.title: ACME Client Request Rate by Status

widgets.description: P50, P95, P99 latency for ACME client requests.
widgets.title: ACME Client Request Latency

widgets.description: CPU seconds consumed by cert-manager controller pods.
widgets.title: Controller CPU Usage

widgets.description: Working-set memory used by cert-manager controller pods.
widgets.title: Controller Memory Usage

widgets.description: Container restart count for cert-manager pods.
widgets.title: Controller Pod Restarts
